name: io.github.bmdhodl/agentguard47
description: MCP server for coding-agent traces, alerts, costs, usage, and budget health.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTGUARD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: AgentGuard read API key for querying traces, alerts, costs, usage, and savings.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTGUARD_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional AgentGuard API base URL. Defaults to production.
